start.speaker: Elder Sophia
start.text: Ah, young adventurer. I sense great potential in you. Perhaps you can help us with a pressing matter?

choices.text: I completed the task you gave me.

quest_offer.speaker: Elder Sophia
quest_offer.text: Dark creatures have been emerging from the ancient ruins nearby. We need someone brave enough to investigate and eliminate the threat. Will you help us?

choices.text: I'll do it. What exactly do you need?
This sounds too dangerous for me.

quest_details.speaker: Elder Sophia
quest_details.text: Venture to the ruins and defeat at least 5 of the creatures lurking there. Also, explore the main chamber - there may be clues about why they've awakened. Return to me when the task is complete.

quest_accepted.speaker: Elder Sophia
quest_accepted.text: Bless you, brave soul! May the light guide your path. Be careful - those ruins are treacherous.

quest_progress.speaker: Elder Sophia
quest_progress.text: How goes your mission? Have you cleared the ruins yet?

encourage.speaker: Elder Sophia
encourage.text: Take your time, but don't tarry too long. The darkness grows stronger each day.

quest_complete.speaker: Elder Sophia
quest_complete.text: You've done it! The village is safe once more, thanks to your bravery. Please, accept this reward as a token of our gratitude.

choices.text: Thank you. I'm glad I could help.

reward.speaker: Elder Sophia
reward.text: May your journey be prosperous, hero. If you ever need guidance, you know where to find me.

decline_quest.speaker: Elder Sophia
decline_quest.text: I understand. Perhaps when you feel more prepared, you can reconsider. The offer stands.

farewell.speaker: Elder Sophia
farewell.text: May the light watch over you, traveler.
